nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=120 beats='Nadia realises the school trip left without her and the Ellery Museum has locked its doors for the night; a note in her pocket, a half-torn map of the museum, hints at a hidden collection the old founder left behind; three ways lead off the dark rotunda'>>

choices.label: Slip into the Gallery of Gems.
Head for the Egyptian Wing.
Try the old Archive downstairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Gallery of Gems glitters under low security lights; a big central case sits crooked on its plinth, and somewhere a soft electronic beeping starts up'>>

choices.label: Study the big central gem case.
Follow the faint beeping toward a panel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the central case has been opened and closed in a hurry; a tilted vitrine and a little card fallen behind it both look like they were disturbed recently, maybe by whoever hid the founder's secret'>>

choices.label: Look under the tilted vitrine.
Read the little card that fell behind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='under the vitrine Nadia finds a scratched brass symbol matching the one on her torn map; it points toward a service corridor behind the gallery'>>

choices.label: Follow the symbol to the corridor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the fallen card is an old exhibit label in the founder's spidery hand, with a single word underlined that also marks a door on her map; it draws her toward the corridor'>>

choices.label: Head for the marked corridor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the narrow service corridor smells of dust and floor polish; at its end a small locked door has a keyhole shaped like the symbol, but no key in sight, only a loose skirting board'>>

choices.label: Pry up the loose skirting board.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the beeping is a motion sensor blinking amber; a night guard's torch beam swings at the far end of the gallery, sweeping closer'>>

choices.label: Duck behind a plinth as the guard passes.
Freeze in the open and hope.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='crouched behind the plinth, Nadia waits until the torch beam moves on; when the guard's footsteps fade she spots a service corridor left ajar'>>

choices.label: Slip into the service corridor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Egyptian Wing is all long shadows and painted eyes; a great sarcophagus stands open-lidded, and a faded wall map shows the museum as it was a hundred years ago'>>

choices.label: Examine the painted sarcophagus.
Trace the wall map of the old museum.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the sarcophagus lid is heavier than it looks and sits slightly off; nearby an amulet display has one empty velvet dent, as if a piece was borrowed and never returned'>>

choices.label: Peek under the loose lid.
Check the amulet display.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='under the lid, tucked in cotton wool, is a brass symbol twin to the one on her map; a draught tugs from a hall behind the wing'>>

choices.label: Follow the draught to the hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the empty velvet dent is labelled in the founder's hand; a thin arrow scratched into the case points toward a connecting hall'>>

choices.label: Take the arrow's direction to the hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the connecting hall is bare except for a small locked door with a symbol-shaped keyhole; a fire bucket of sand and old tools sits beside it, one loose floor tile rocking underfoot'>>

choices.label: Lift the rocking floor tile.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the wall map shows a wing that is not on any modern floor plan; a display torch hangs on a bracket, and beyond a velvet rope a dim roped-off gallery beckons'>>

choices.label: Grab the display torch and press on.
Duck under the rope into the dark gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='torch in hand, Nadia follows the map's forgotten wing to a hall she has not seen, where a small symbol-marked door waits'>>

choices.label: Approach the marked door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Archive smells of old paper; a dusty visitor ledger lies open on a lectern, and beyond the reading lamps the back stacks fade into total dark'>>

choices.label: Open the dusty visitor ledger.
Push into the unlit back stacks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the ledger's last century of names ends abruptly; a card index and a sticking bottom drawer both seem to hold what the founder filed away before the museum forgot him'>>

choices.label: Check the card index.
Try the sticking bottom drawer.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='one index card is out of order, marked with the same brass symbol; it references a locked cabinet deep in the stacks'>>

choices.label: Follow the card into the stacks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the drawer holds a folded plan of the stacks with one shelf circled; the circle matches a symbol on her torn map'>>

choices.label: Head for the circled shelf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='deep in the stacks a low cabinet has a symbol-shaped keyhole and no key; a row of dictionaries hides a shallow gap behind, just wide enough for a hand'>>

choices.label: Reach into the gap behind the books.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the back stacks are pitch black and the shelves feel endless; a lantern shape hangs somewhere to the left, or she could just push on by feel'>>

choices.label: Feel along the shelf for a lantern.
Keep going blind into the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='her fingers close on a battery lantern; its beam shows a symbol-marked shelf ahead and a low cabinet tucked behind it'>>

choices.label: Cross to the marked shelf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=115 beats='BOTTLENECK: whichever route she took, Nadia finds the same hidden brass key wrapped in oilcloth, stamped with the founder's symbol; a coded note is tied to it; the key could open the study, the sealed cabinet, or the service stairs'>>

choices.label: Try the key on the founder's study door.
Try it on the sealed display cabinet.
Try it on the locked service stairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the key turns the study door; inside, a roll-top desk and a stern painted portrait of the founder watch over a room untouched for decades'>>

choices.label: Search the roll-top desk.
Look behind the founder's portrait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the desk's pigeonholes hide a leather notebook; its first page carries the same coded note as the key, half of a cipher waiting to be read'>>

choices.label: Carry the notebook to the reading table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='behind the portrait a shallow safe stands open and empty but for a cipher wheel, the exact tool the coded note seems to need'>>

choices.label: Take the cipher wheel to the table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the sealed cabinet holds the founder's travel journals under stiff glass; the key fits the brass latch but the lid is jammed with age'>>

choices.label: Ease the cabinet open.
Force the stubborn latch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='patient wiggling frees the lid without a sound; inside, a slim ledger is bookmarked at a page of coded lines'>>

choices.label: Lift out the bookmarked ledger.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the ledger's coded page matches the note on the key; a reading table under a green lamp is the place to lay it all out'>>

choices.label: Spread the ledger on the reading table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='she leans hard on the latch and the old glass creaks in warning; ease off now, or give it one firm yank'>>

choices.label: Steady it before the glass cracks.
Yank it hard.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she breathes, lifts gently, and the lid gives; the bookmarked ledger slides free with its coded page uppermost, ready to read'>>

choices.label: Settle in to read the code.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the key opens the service stairs; the stairwell climbs into shadow, and a small cupboard sits at its base with something pale inside'>>

choices.label: Climb toward the landing.
Check the cupboard at the base.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the landing opens onto the founder's old reading table, a green lamp still on it, and beside the lamp the coded note and a cipher wheel'>>

choices.label: Sit at the reading table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the cupboard holds a rolled chart and the founder's spare spectacles; the chart is a page of code that begs for a quiet table'>>

choices.label: Take the chart up to the reading table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=110 beats='BOTTLENECK: every route brings Nadia to the founder's reading table with the coded note and the cipher wheel together at last; under the green lamp she lines them up to read the first line'>>

choices.label: Read the first line of the cipher.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=115 beats='BOTTLENECK: the first cipher line resolves into a direction, follow the stars, and points to three named rooms that all ring the central rotunda; the Astronomy Hall, the Map Room, or the Clock Corridor'>>

choices.label: Head to the Astronomy Hall the cipher names.
Head to the Map Room.
Head down the Clock Corridor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Astronomy Hall glimmers with a painted star dome; a spiral leads up toward the dome, and a maintenance ladder offers a shortcut'>>

choices.label: Climb toward the star dome.
Take the maintenance ladder.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='under the dome a painted constellation matches the cipher's clue; a marked door beneath it opens toward the rotunda at the museum's heart'>>

choices.label: Take the marked door to the rotunda.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the ladder rises to a narrow catwalk high over the hall; a steady walk across leads to a service door, but the dark above tempts her higher'>>

choices.label: Edge across the catwalk.
Climb higher into the dark dome.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she keeps her eyes forward and crosses the catwalk to a service door that lets down toward the rotunda'>>

choices.label: Descend toward the rotunda.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Map Room is lined with charts; a great floor globe stands on brass rails, and a giant bound atlas lies open on a slanted stand'>>

choices.label: Spin the great floor globe.
Open the giant atlas.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='turning the globe to the cipher's latitude clicks a hidden catch; a low panel swings aside onto a passage toward the rotunda'>>

choices.label: Step through toward the rotunda.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the atlas falls open at a hand-drawn page the founder added; a route is inked across it in faded red toward the museum's centre'>>

choices.label: Follow the inked red route.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the red route threads a back stair and a store room and comes out, exactly as drawn, at a door onto the central rotunda'>>

choices.label: Open the rotunda door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Clock Corridor ticks with a hundred old clocks; one doorway leads to the gear room behind them, another passes under a slow, heavy pendulum'>>

choices.label: Follow the ticking to the gear room.
Cross under the great pendulum.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='in the gear room the master clock's hands are set to the cipher's hour; nudging them true opens a maintenance door toward the rotunda'>>

choices.label: Go through the maintenance door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the pendulum swings across the only doorway on a slow, steady beat; she can time her steps and slip under, or rush it while it is far'>>

choices.label: Time your steps past the pendulum.
Rush across before it swings back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she counts the beat, waits, and walks through cleanly between swings; the passage beyond slopes down to the rotunda'>>

choices.label: Follow the passage to the rotunda.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=115 beats='BOTTLENECK: all roads meet at the central rotunda, where a great clockwork globe of brass rings stands under the glass dome; the cipher says the founder hid his real collection here; she can align the globe, hunt the pedestal for a panel, or check the guard's records room'>>

choices.label: Align the clockwork globe to the cipher.
Search the pedestal for a hidden panel.
Slip into the night-guard's records room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the clockwork globe's brass rings turn with a whisper; the cipher gives an exact setting, but the rings are stiff and easy to spin past'>>

choices.label: Set the rings exactly as decoded.
Spin the rings by feel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she sets each ring to the decoded mark; the globe sighs, gears mesh, and a section of the marble floor slides back onto a stair going down'>>

choices.label: Descend the hidden stair.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='spun by feel, the rings clunk into a wrong pattern and the globe groans; she can start over and decode it properly, or lean in and force the rings'>>

choices.label: Start over and decode it properly.
Force the rings into place.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she resets the rings, reads the cipher twice, and turns each to its true mark; this time the globe opens the floor onto a downward stair'>>

choices.label: Take the stair down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the pedestal under the globe is carved with sliding tiles; one seam breathes a cool draught, hinting at a side door as well as a puzzle'>>

choices.label: Solve the little sliding puzzle.
Follow the draught to the side door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='sliding the tiles into the founder's symbol releases a catch under the pedestal; the marble opens onto the hidden stair'>>

choices.label: Go down the hidden stair.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the draught leads to a low side door the plans never showed; it opens on a dusty room crowded with half-built clockwork and glass cases'>>

choices.label: Step into the hidden room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='this is the founder's private workshop, sealed and forgotten, its benches loaded with unfinished automata and labelled wonders; not the treasure the cipher promised, but a marvel all its own'>>

choices.label: Take it all in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the guard's records room hums with old monitors; a rounds log lies open on the desk, and a heavy black telephone sits within reach'>>

choices.label: Read the guard's rounds log.
Use the desk phone.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the log's oldest entry, in the founder's hand, notes a stair that opens under the globe at the cipher's hour; she hurries back and the marble is already sliding open'>>

choices.label: Descend the opened stair.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the phone still works; she could call for a lift home now, safe and sound, with the mystery half-solved and a story to tell'>>

choices.label: Call home from the museum desk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=120 beats='BOTTLENECK: the hidden stair opens on the founder's secret chamber, shelves of donated treasures he meant the whole town to share but never lived to reveal; a sealed letter, an old treasure map, and a decision, what to do with all of it'>>

choices.label: Read the founder's sealed letter.
Study the old treasure map.
Decide who to tell.
Grab something to prove it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the letter explains everything: the founder hid the collection to protect it, and asks whoever finds it to give it back to the town; a last line points to one final resting clue'>>

choices.label: Follow the letter's final clue.
Keep the letter safe and leave the rest.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the final clue lifts a false shelf to reveal the founder's catalogue, naming every piece and where it truly belongs; the whole mystery lies open in her hands'>>

choices.label: Read the catalogue to the end.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=100 beats='page by page the catalogue tells the town's lost history and clears the founder's name; by dawn Nadia understands not just where the treasure is, but why it was hidden and how to give it back'>>

choices.label: Carry the whole truth up into the morning.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she tucks the letter into her coat and leaves the treasures untouched; the founder's words feel like a trust she means to honour, carefully, in daylight'>>

choices.label: Slip out with the letter and a plan.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the old treasure map marks a walled-up wing where more of the collection waits; she could follow it now, photograph it for later, or lose herself tracing every faded line'>>

choices.label: Follow the map to the walled-up wing.
Photograph the map and go.
Keep tracing it as the sky greys.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the map leads her behind a plaster wall to a small sealed gallery of paintings the town thought lost forever; she marks the way and photographs each frame'>>

choices.label: Bring the lost wing to light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she photographs the map corner to corner and leaves the chamber exactly as she found it, evidence safe on her phone for whoever should decide'>>

choices.label: Head out with the proof.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='she thinks about who should know: the curator would make it right, her friends would keep it thrilling and secret, or she could simply leave it for the museum to rediscover on its own'>>

choices.label: Wake the curator with proof.
Keep it a secret with your friends.
Leave it for the museum to find.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she gathers the letter and catalogue and, at first light, meets the astonished curator at the staff door with the whole discovery laid out'>>

choices.label: Hand over the founder's trust.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she decides the chamber will be the secret of her and her closest friends, a private wonder to visit and protect, at least for now'>>

choices.label: Seal the secret with a promise.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she leaves the founder's own map propped open on the guard's desk with a note, trusting the museum to follow it and finish what he started'>>

choices.label: Leave the clue and slip away.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='a small jewelled owl on the nearest shelf would prove everything in an instant; her hand hovers over it, and she weighs taking it against leaving it be'>>

choices.label: Slip it in your bag and run.
Set it back where it belongs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the owl in her bag, she bolts up the stair, but the owl's shelf was pressure-set and a gentle chime of bells follows her all the way to the hall'>>

choices.label: Reach the hall with the bells ringing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she sets the owl back on its velvet, deciding the truth is worth more than a trophy, and climbs out with only her notes and a clear conscience'>>

choices.label: Leave with clean hands.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the guard's torch finds Nadia standing in the open; kindly but firmly he walks her to the lobby to wait for a lift, the mystery left for another day; safe, a little embarrassed, no harm done'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the roped-off gallery's door clicks shut behind her and will not open from the inside; she settles on a bench to wait out the night, warm and safe, the founder's secret still hidden'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='blind in the endless stacks, Nadia loses all sense of direction and decides to sit tight until the lights come on at opening; uncomfortable and dusty, but perfectly safe, the cabinet unopened'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the glass cracks with a sharp snap and the noise brings the guard at a run; nothing is hurt but the case, and Nadia spends the rest of the night explaining herself in the lobby, the code unread'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='high in the dark dome the ladder ends at a bricked hatch; she climbs carefully back down and gives up the route, tired and dizzy but unhurt, the rotunda still out of reach tonight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='she rushes and mistimes it; the slow pendulum bumps her back gently but firmly onto the safe side of the doorway, and she decides the Clock Corridor has beaten her for the night'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='forced too hard, the brass rings lock solid and will not turn either way; the hidden stair stays shut, and Nadia sits by the silent globe to wait for morning, so close and yet stuck'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=90 beats='the ringing bells lead the guard straight to her; red-faced, Nadia hands back the little owl and puts everything right, let off with a stern word and a promise to return by daylight, the treasure safe and the lesson learned'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=90 beats='lost in the map's every line, Nadia looks up to find the sky already grey and the staff arriving; she slips out with the mystery only half-traced, promising herself she will come back and finish it properly'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='the founder's forgotten workshop becomes Nadia's quiet triumph; she photographs the automata, leaves everything untouched, and by morning tells the curator of a whole lost room, a wonder no one knew survived; a warm, satisfying discovery'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='with the letter, the catalogue, and the whole truth, Nadia walks into the morning and hands the founder's story back to the town; the lost collection is found, his name is cleared, and the museum will never be quite the same; the main triumphant ending'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Nadia leaves with only the founder's letter and a promise to honour it; in the weeks that follow she quietly guides the curator toward the truth, keeper of a trust she chose to carry gently; a calm, happy ending'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='the walled-up wing of lost paintings is Nadia's discovery to give; her photographs bring restorers and reporters, and the town crowds in to see what was hidden for a century; a proud, satisfying win'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='at first light the curator listens open-mouthed, then leads a careful team down the hidden stair; Nadia is thanked as the girl who gave the founder's gift back to everyone, exactly as he wished; a warm, complete ending'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='the hidden chamber becomes the treasured secret of Nadia and her friends, a wonder they visit and guard together; it is theirs alone for now, a bond and a promise; a happy, private ending'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Nadia leaves the founder's own map open on the desk with a careful note; days later the museum follows it, finds the collection, and never learns whose small hands set them on the path; a quiet, generous ending'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Nadia calls home from the guard's desk and waits in the warm lobby for a lift, the mystery half-solved and safe in her notebook; not the full triumph, but a good night's adventure and a promise to return; safe and content'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='with the map safe on her phone and the chamber left untouched, Nadia slips out at dawn; she has proof enough to bring the right people back, and lets the grown-ups decide what happens next; a measured, open ending'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Nadia leaves the treasures where they belong and climbs out with only her notes; she has not solved everything, but she has learned what she is willing to do and not do, and walks home wiser than she came; a thoughtful ending'>>
